title: Surgical fix: correct 3 defects in in-flight sidecar startup diagnostics implementation
consumer_purpose: Safe mode page correctly displays a single sidecar failure panel with complete type information
claim_atoms:
1. Fix-A removes the duplicate JSX block at safe-mode.tsx:86-103
2. Fix-B corrects writePhase() phase names for phases 2-6 and adds new phases to StartupPhase type
3. Fix-C adds errorCode?: string to SidecarStartupFailure type
4. bun typecheck passes after all three fixes
5. No new files
